rulings.Case Title: AMANDA HEIER et al VS. RUSSELL W WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 8, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANTS RUSSELL WONG, ALVIN WONG, VICTOR WONG, GEORGIANA WONG MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion denied, failure to shift burden of proof. Defendants' reply memorandum stricken due to excessive length and failure to obtain leave of court. CRC 3.1113(d) and 3.1113(e). San Francisco Administrative Code section 37.9C(e)(1) states that each tenant receiving a covered no-fault eviction notice shall receive half of the relocation expenses from the landlord at the time of the notice, and the other half when the unit is vacated. The ordinance contains no exceptions. The OMI notice that failure to vacate the premises within 60 days will result in legal proceedings, that prorata rent is due and payable, and that the tenants are entitled to one half of the relocation expenses when the unit is vacated. Plaintiff's 7-8-2008 letter did not supersede the 60-day notice. The Rent Ordinance is remedial legislation which should be liberally construed to effect its purposes. This is a late tentative ruling. =(302/CWW)
